positive: Minimalist abstract geometric design featuring interlocking celestial bodies (moons, planets, constellations) arranged in a cohesive, radial pattern. The style is modern neo-tribal with clean vector lines and deep silhouette contrasts. Primary color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, and ethereal gold accents on a stark white background. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, designed as a scalable repeating pattern element. Focus on clean, crisp lines, perfect symmetry, and a strong, graphic contrast suitable for apparel screen printing. High detail, sharp edges, perfect composition.
